summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaaS SEO automation platform. Backend APIs 96% functional (24/25 tests passed). All core SaaS features working: landing page, pricing page (4 plans), user registration with trial creation, dashboard access, billing page with trial banner, and BYOAK functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Variable reference error in BYOAK API keys update endpoint
minor_bugs.impact: Users cannot save their custom API keys

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, features, pricing preview, testimonials
Pricing page displays all 4 plans (Starter €19, Pro €49, Agency €99, Enterprise €199)
User registration creates 7-day trial subscription automatically
Dashboard accessible at /app/dashboard after successful registration/login
Billing page shows trial banner with days remaining (6 days observed)
BYOAK tab accessible in billing page
All 24 backend API endpoints functional (auth, dashboard, articles, keywords, calendar, backlinks, WordPress, settings)
SaaS plans API returns correct pricing structure
Usage API shows trial status and limits

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor session issues during extended testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the variable reference issue in /app/backend/saas/routes.py line ~240 in the BYOAK API keys update endpoint to allow users to save their custom API keys
